_doc: Governance-provider USAGE PRICING. All amounts are exact-decimal STRINGS (never JSON floats — Money refuses a float, that is the float-ban at the type boundary). Rates are per 1000 tokens; tool_fees keyed by 'skill' or 'skill/perk' (the skill's pay route / MCP-call / paid-API passthrough); marketplace_fee_pct is applied to the subtotal. The gov provider owns this file; a skill MAY also declare a `price` in its perk metadata.json (used when no fee is set here).
